rate_limits.description: No fixed rate limits. DeepSeek uses dynamic throttling based on system load and account history.
rate_limits.rpm_limits: No explicit RPM limits - throttled dynamically
rate_limits.tpm_limits: No explicit TPM limits - throttled dynamically
notes: New accounts may have more restrictive initial throttling
Limits increase over time with consistent usage and payment history
May receive 429 errors during high system load

free_tier.description: 5 million free tokens upon account creation

cache_pricing.description: Discounted pricing for cached tokens (input tokens that have been seen before)
cache_pricing.discount_rate: 50% of standard input price for cache hits

activation.minimum_deposit: No minimum deposit required for free tier

notes: DeepSeek is known for competitive pricing and high-quality reasoning capabilities. Dynamic throttling requires careful error handling and retry logic in production applications.
